title: User
description: A Zendesk user representing an end user, agent, or admin in the account.

url.description: The API URL of the user.

email.description: The primary email address of the user.

phone.description: The primary phone number of the user.

locale_id.description: The locale ID of the user.

locale.description: The locale of the user (e.g., en-US).

time_zone.description: The time zone of the user.

organization_id.description: The ID of the user's default organization.

custom_role_id.description: The custom role ID for agents with custom roles.

verified.description: Whether the user's identity has been verified.

external_id.description: An external ID for the user from an integrated system.

alias.description: An alias displayed instead of the agent's name.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

shared.description: Whether the user is shared from a different Zendesk Support instance.

shared_agent.description: Whether the user is a shared agent from a different instance.

shared_phone_number.description: Whether the phone number is shared.

signature.description: The signature text appended to the agent's comments.

details.description: Details about the user visible only to agents.

notes.description: Notes about the user visible only to agents.

restricted_agent.description: Whether the agent has restrictions (true for agents in a custom role with restrictions).

default_group_id.description: The default group ID for the agent.

report_csv.description: Whether the user can access the CSV report.

only_private_comments.description: Whether the user can only create private comments (for restricted end users).

ticket_restriction.description: The ticket access restriction for the agent.

moderator.description: Whether the user has community moderator privileges.

chat_only.description: Whether the user is a chat-only agent.

last_login_at.description: The last time the user signed in (ISO 8601).

updated_at.description: When the user was last updated (ISO 8601).
